title: Building a Reliable Podcast Production Pipeline

posts.text: Episode 14 is live: "Building a Reliable Podcast Production Pipeline" with Maya Chen. Most podcast teams don't need more AI—they need fewer invisible handoffs. A transcript is rich input, not final truth. https://creators.example.com/checklists/podcast-release

A good pipeline reduces noise before you ask another tool or teammate to build on the result. Use automation for acceleration, not abdication. Make the machine produce options; make the human approve what becomes public. https://creators.example.com/guests/maya-chen
